market_only.name: Market price alone
market_only.note: Baseline: crowd wisdom with no model

random_fade.name: Random fade strategy
random_fade.note: Random selection of same N markets, 1000 simulations

heuristic.name: Price extremity heuristic (no LLM)
heuristic.note: Flags markets >80% or <20% — no model needed

no_conformal.name: LLM mean, no conformal intervals
no_conformal.note: Flag where |p_hat - market| > 0.15, no uncertainty wrapper

disagreement_only.name: Ensemble disagreement only (no conformal)
disagreement_only.note: Flag where σ > 0.1 without calibration wrapper

weight_sensitivity.note: ROI stability across 50 random weight combinations
